question_text: Light hits a glass surface at an angle of incidence of 20° and refracts. The angle of refraction is 13°. Is the light travelling from glass to air or from air to glass?
explanation: The angle of refraction (13°) is smaller than the angle of incidence (20°), which means the light is bending away from the normal. Light only bends away from the normal when traveling from a denser medium (glass) to a less dense medium (air).
